source: Google Search, HouseCashin, Ohio Cash Buyers, FirstKey Homes, Berkadia SFR Report

institutional_buyers.name: Progress Residential (Pretium Partners)
institutional_buyers.portfolio_size: ~90,000 homes nationally, 2nd largest SFR owner in US

buy_box.year_built: Prefers post-1970, flexible on older if suburban
buy_box.neighborhoods: Desirable suburban areas with good schools

contact.acquisitions_note: Progress does NOT have a public acquisitions portal. Deals flow through wholesale channels, InvestorLift, and direct broker relationships. They buy via local acquisition managers.
contact.linkedin_search: Search 'Progress Residential acquisitions manager Cincinnati Ohio' on LinkedIn

match_score.copeland_1318_woodland: MEDIUM - 2BR/2BA is below their 3BR minimum. Age (1947) is older than preferred. BUT Roselawn location is acceptable suburban and price point fits.
match_score.dickson_10737_lemarie: HIGH - 3BR/1BA, 1924 sqft, Sharonville suburb, good schools. $195K appraised fits their range. 1961 build is borderline but acceptable.
match_score.holthause_4309_st_martins: MEDIUM - Need to verify bed/bath count. Price Hill area is less desirable for Progress.
match_score.spurling_2494_wilson: MEDIUM - 3BR/1BA, Mount Healthy Heights. 1090 sqft may be too small.

buy_box.neighborhoods: Suburban Cincinnati, active in Wilson Ave area (45231)
buy_box.acquisition_method: Cash offers, portfolio buys, wholesaler channels

contact.acquisitions_note: FirstKey buys through local acquisition teams and wholesale pipelines. No public portal. InvestorLift and direct broker submissions.
contact.linkedin_search: Search 'FirstKey Homes acquisitions analyst Cincinnati Ohio' on LinkedIn

match_score.copeland_1318_woodland: MEDIUM - 2BR is below preferred. Roselawn is acceptable.
match_score.dickson_10737_lemarie: HIGH - 3BR, Sharonville, $195K fits perfectly. FirstKey is active in 45241.
match_score.spurling_2494_wilson: HIGH - 3BR, Wilson Ave area. FirstKey confirmed active in this zip (45231).
match_score.holthause_4309_st_martins: LOW-MEDIUM - Price Hill is less institutional-friendly.

buy_box.property_type: Single-family homes, some condos in premium locations
buy_box.neighborhoods: Targets mid-to-high-end suburban (Blue Ash, Sharonville, Montgomery)
buy_box.acquisition_method: Vertically integrated - own acquisition, finance, management. Cash + portfolio deals.

contact.acquisitions_note: Amherst operates through Main Street Renewal (property management arm). Acquisitions go through regional acquisition managers. InvestorLift pipeline active.
contact.linkedin_search: Search 'Amherst Group acquisitions Ohio' or 'Main Street Renewal acquisitions Cincinnati'

match_score.dickson_10737_lemarie: HIGHEST - Sharonville is premium Amherst territory. 3BR, 1924 sqft, $195K appraised ($280K est actual). Perfect fit.
match_score.wolf_10885_fallsington: HIGH - Blue Ash condo, $252K appraised. Premium location. BUT she is on no-contact until Apr 24.
match_score.copeland_1318_woodland: MEDIUM - Roselawn is borderline for Amherst. 2BR may not fit.
match_score.spurling_2494_wilson: LOW - Mount Healthy Heights is below Amherst's typical quality threshold.

local_cash_buyers.name: Ohio Cash Buyers LLC

buy_box.condition: Any condition, as-is, foreclosure, fire damage, condemned
buy_box.situations: Foreclosure, divorce, inherited, vacancy, liens, back taxes, probate

match_score.all_leads: HIGH - They buy anything in any condition. Great backup buyer. Won't pay institutional prices but will close fast.
match_score.copeland_1318_woodland: HIGH - They specifically list foreclosure buying.
match_score.dickson_10737_lemarie: HIGH - Sharonville explicitly on their coverage page.

local_cash_buyers.disposition_strategy: Backup buyer if institutional funds pass. Assignment fee may be lower ($5-8K vs $10-15K from institutions) but closing certainty is higher.

local_cash_buyers.name: CVG Home Buyers
local_cash_buyers.address: 720 East Pete Rose Way Ste 355, Cincinnati OH 45202

match_score.all_leads: MEDIUM - Local operator, good backup option
MEDIUM - Local operator, another backup option
MEDIUM-HIGH - WeBuyHouses franchise, established brand, Northland Blvd is near Sharonville.

tier_1_institutional.approach: Submit via InvestorLift or direct to acquisitions managers via LinkedIn. Package deal with ARV, rent comps, photos.
tier_1_institutional.best_lead_match: Troy Dickson (10737 Lemarie Dr) - fits ALL three institutional buy boxes. $195K appraised, $280K est actual, Sharonville suburb, 3BR.

tier_2_local_professional.approach: Direct phone call. They're used to working with wholesalers. Show the numbers.
tier_2_local_professional.best_lead_match: Joseph Copeland (1318 Woodland Ave) - 2BR may not fit institutional, but local buyers will take it.

tier_3_backup.approach: Quick phone pitch if Tier 1 and 2 pass.

investorlift_note: InvestorLift (investorlift.com) is the primary wholesale-to-institutional marketplace. You need an account ($97/mo starter plan) to list properties and match with institutional buyers. This is where Progress, FirstKey, and Amherst acquisition managers browse deal flow. Strongly recommend signing up before getting a property under contract.
next_steps: 1. Sign up for InvestorLift ($97/mo) to access institutional buyer network
2. LinkedIn outreach to Progress/FirstKey/Amherst acquisition managers in Cincinnati
3. Call Ohio Cash Buyers (513) 815-5000 and We Buy Houses Cincinnati (513) 878-1677 to establish relationship BEFORE having a deal
4. Once Copeland or Dickson is under contract, submit to all three tiers simultaneously
5. Dickson (Lemarie Dr) is the #1 disposition candidate - fits all three institutional buy boxes
